functions.name: list_init
functions.brief_description: Initialize a list to defaults values.

functions.name: list_pool_init
functions.brief_description: Construct a list of free elements representing a pool

functions.name: list_push_back
functions.brief_description: Add an element as last on the list.

functions.name: list_push_back_sublist
functions.brief_description: Append a sequence of elements at the end of a list.  Note: the elements to append shall be linked together

functions.name: list_push_front
functions.brief_description: Add an element as first on the list.

functions.name: list_extract
functions.brief_description: Search for a given element in the list, and extract it if found.

functions.name: list_extract_after
functions.brief_description: Extract an element when the previous element is known  Note: the element to remove shall follow immediately the reference within the list

functions.name: list_extract_sublist
functions.brief_description: Extract a sub-list when the previous element is known  Note: the elements to remove shall be linked together and  follow immediately the reference element

functions.name: list_find
functions.brief_description: Searched a given element in the list.

functions.name: list_merge
functions.brief_description: Merge two lists in a single one.  This function appends the list pointed by list2 to the list pointed by list1. Once the merge is done, it empties list2.

functions.name: list_insert_before
functions.brief_description: Insert a given element in the list before the referenced element.

functions.name: list_insert_after
functions.brief_description: Insert a given element in the list after the referenced element.

functions.name: list_size
functions.brief_description: Count number of elements present in the list
